description: This collection serves to bring together advertisments for a variety of products and services for items sold within the United Kingdom. This doesn't mean this collection contains products manufactuered in the United Kingdom, but instead products sold (thus advertised) in the United Kingdom. Advertisments (also referred to as "commercials" or "adverts") are a time honoured tradition of promoting the sale of a product or services to the general public and can come in many formats. This collection will include the following format types: - Print advertisments (such as those found in magazines, newspapers) - Filmed advertisments (such as those broadcast on British television channels) ( external index ) - Audio advertisments (such as those broadcast on British radio stations) Category Subject Tags: To help group these advertising articles together, I will try and use the following subject tags when necessary [some articles will have multiple tags]: Alcohol - for any advert about any kind of alcohol including beer and wine Automotive - for any advert about cars or vans, related parts or services (excluding insurance) Campaign -  for any advert that could be percieved as a campaign for public services or public good, examples could include voluntary services, charity donations, national health information (like smoking campaigns). The subject being advertised is rarely a commercial entity or intended to make profit. Cosmetics - for any advert about make-up and similar cosmetic goods, includes perfumes and cologne Fashion  - for any advert about clothing, shoes, watches, jewellery Financial - for any advert about credit cards, loans, banking services, insurance Food - for any advert about any kind of food be it cereals, snacks, cheese Drink - for any advert about any kind of drink (excluding alcoholic drinks) Homewares - for any advert about home cleaning products like bleach, cleaning sprays, washing detergent Magazines  - for any advert about a magazine of any subject, but no newspapers Medicine  - for any advert about medicines or pharmaceutical products available over the counter, for example cough syrup or pain relief Miscellaneous - for any advert about a subject that is not yet defined or needs to be addressed Movies - for any advert about a film be it in theatres, home video release or rental release Music - for any advert about items like CD albums, concerts or musical instruments Newspapers - for any advert about newspapers Personal Hygiene - for any advert about items used for personal hygiene like deodorant, shampoo, soap Retailer - for any advert about a retailer such as supermarkets, furniture stores or clothing stores Technology - for any advert about general technolgy such as telecommunications, internet access Tobacco - for any advert about cigarettes, rolling tobacco, cigars, filters Toys - for any advert about toys for children, excluding video games Travel - for any advert about travel such as holidays, trains, ferries or air travel Video Games - for any advert about any kind of video game, including consoles and accessories A Word on Quality: Wherever possible I will chose the best quality available, however when considering that most of the items here are recorded onto consumer grade equipment such as VHS tape or audio cassette the quality may not be overly high. If a better quality version is found, it will be added to the existing item. A Word on Duplicates: As you can imagine, ingesting these adverts is not done in a manner which is chronographical - I get ads from all years in all kinds, however I do try and keep the amount of duplicates uploaded to a minimum, and will upload minor variations to a single identifier if I believe there is enough  similar  to the existing entry.
subject: advertisements
commercials
title: UK Adverts Collection
